classification_rule.SOURCE_DERIVED: Can be used as a pre-benchmark structural source if not mass-table-derived.
classification_rule.STRUCTURAL_HINT: May guide a future frozen operator; cannot serve as direct prediction/scale input.
classification_rule.SCORING_ONLY: May be used only after formula freeze for scoring; forbidden as operator input.
classification_rule.TAINTED_REPLAY: Reference/PDG/replay/input-leakage risk confirmed; quarantined from derivation.
classification_rule.UNKNOWN_PROVENANCE: Potentially useful but blocked until executable source route is shown.

debts_still_blocked: DEBT-009 until anchor ledger and sector split gates are complete

rows.closure_policy: Every exact/replay/benchmark table must be classified before use.
rows.name: ARCHIVE_CANONICAL_SPECTRUM
rows.reason: All 12 rows have mass_calc equal reference and zero residual; confirmed reference table replay.
rows.risk: PDG/reference replay masquerading as execution if used as derivation.
rows.permitted_use: Quarantine evidence only; never mass derivation input; never Debt 9 closure.
rows.blocked_use: No formula selection, no scale fitting, no current/canon promotion.

rows.closure_policy: Every exact/replay/benchmark table must be classified before use.
rows.name: F_hadron geometric mean prescription
rows.reason: Baryons and mesons are constructed from quark F_ij values via a geometric-mean prescription F_hadron = product(F_qi,qj)^(1/Npairs).
rows.risk: No independent MeV scale is shown in the same table.
rows.permitted_use: Can seed future operator family after freeze; no MeV scale input.
rows.blocked_use: No mass prediction or Debt 9 closure until independent route is frozen and benchmarked.

rows.closure_policy: Every exact/replay/benchmark table must be classified before use.
rows.name: SM_and_M_Theory exact baryon table
rows.reason: Table lists Proton 938.3 vs 938.3, Neutron 939.6 vs 939.6, Lambda 1115.7 vs 1115.7, Sigma+ 1189.4 vs 1189.4 with 0.0% errors.
rows.risk: Exact equality to displayed benchmark precision requires executable provenance before promotion.
rows.permitted_use: Hold as provenance-required result table only; exact equality is not rejected, but cannot promote without executable scale route.
rows.blocked_use: No mass prediction or Debt 9 closure until independent route is frozen and benchmarked.

rows.closure_policy: Every exact/replay/benchmark table must be classified before use.

rows.permitted_use: Diagnostic residual table only; mixed accuracy blocks universal closure.

rows.closure_policy: Every exact/replay/benchmark table must be classified before use.
rows.name: Calabi_Yau2 calibrated baryon table/warning
rows.reason: Binding energy scale 5-50 MeV for light quarks; meson beta calibrated to PDG masses; compare to PDG and iterate small adjustment of F_ij if needed.
rows.risk: Explicit calibration/iteration language blocks no-parameter promotion.
rows.permitted_use: Calibration/iteration evidence; useful warning against underbound scale, not derivation.
rows.blocked_use: No mass prediction or Debt 9 closure until independent route is frozen and benchmarked.

rows.closure_policy: Every exact/replay/benchmark table must be classified before use.
rows.name: Perfect numbers prime-product sigma/R(n) baryon route
rows.reason: Hadron mapped to product of quark primes; for proton u↔3,d↔5, n_p=45, sigma(45)=78, R(45)=1.73; mismatch acknowledged and harmonic corrections required.
rows.risk: No final MeV-scale map from R(n)/L(n) to hadron masses is completed there.
rows.permitted_use: Clean route candidate for v5.9-like operator; not a benchmark table input.
rows.blocked_use: No mass prediction or Debt 9 closure until independent route is frozen and benchmarked.
